title: Kyiv National Academic Theatre of Operetta
summary: The Kyiv National Theatre of Operetta (Ukrainian: Київський національний академічний театр оперети, romanized: Kyivskyi natsionalnyi akademichnyi teatr operety) is a theatre in Kyiv in Ukraine. It was founded in 1934.
text: The Kyiv National Theatre of Operetta (Ukrainian: Київський національний академічний театр оперети, romanized: Kyivskyi natsionalnyi akademichnyi teatr operety) is a theatre in Kyiv in Ukraine. It was founded in 1934.
